name: LinkFrameAttributes
summary: The LinkFrameAttributes class contains the attributes for controlling the appearance of a link frame.

constructors.name: LinkFrameAttributes
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the LinkFrameAttributes class

methods.name: GetAxisAlignedBoundingBox
methods.summary: Gets the bounding box of the frame in the global axis coordinate system.

returns.doc: The bounding box of the frame in the global axis coordinate system.

methods.name: GetObjectAlignedBoundingBox
methods.summary: Gets the bounding box of the frame in the local coordinate system.

returns.doc: The bounding box of the frame in the local coordinate system.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

params.name: ObjectToCompare
params.doc: The object to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

properties.name: Line
properties.summary: Gets or sets the line type.
